executives.name: Darren Millman
executives.background: Mr. Millman was appointed Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in April 2016. He joined Centerra in 2013 as Treasurer. Prior to Centerra, he held various senior financial positions at Ivanhoe Mines.

executives.name: George Burns
executives.background: George Burns has over 35 years of experience in the mineral sector including executive, operations and project development leadership roles. Prior to joining Eldorado, he was Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at Goldcorp. He has also held positions at Centerra Gold Inc., Asarco LLC, and Cyprus Amax Minerals Company.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Ian Atkinson
executives.background: Mr. Atkinson was previously the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has extensive experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Jacques Perron
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Pretium Resources Inc. and Thompson Creek Metals Company.

executives.name: Jeff Parr
executives.background: Mr. Parr is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the CFO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has served on the boards of several mining companies.

executives.name: Paul Tomory
executives.background: Mr. Tomory was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Centerra Gold in May 2023. Prior to joining Centerra, he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Technical Officer at Kinross Gold Corporation from 2017 to 2023. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Richard Connor
executives.background: Mr. Connor is a retired audit partner from KPMG LLP with over 38 years of experience.

executives.name: Scott Perry
executives.background: Mr. Perry was formerly the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc.

executives.name: Stephen Lang
executives.background: Mr. Lang is the Chair of the Board. He was formerly the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at Stillwater Mining Company and Barrick Gold.

executives.name: Wendy Kei
executives.background: Ms. Kei is a corporate director and was formerly the CFO of Dominion Diamond Corporation.

executives.name: Yousef Rehman
executives.background: Mr. Rehman is the Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary. He joined Centerra in 2013.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Legal and Public Affairs

board_of_directors.name: Ian Atkinson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Atkinson was previously the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has extensive experience in the mining industry.
